description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.
examples:
!infoblox-cloud-get-indicators limit="5" indicator_types="EMAIL,IP,HOST,HASH,URL" from_date="2023-01-01T00:00:00.000Z" to_date="2024-12-31T23:59:59.999Z"
Context Example
#
{
"Infoblox"
:
{
"FeedIndicator"

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.type Type of the indicator (HOST, IP, URL, EMAIL, HASH).
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.id

outputs.description: Hostname of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.domain Domain of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.host

outputs.description: IP address of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.email Email address of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.ip

outputs.description: Hash of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.hash_type Hash type of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.hash

outputs.description: URL of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.value The indicator value.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.url

outputs.description: Top-level domain of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.threat_level Threat level of the indicator (0-100).
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.tld

outputs.description: Threat label of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.confidence Confidence level of the indicator (0-100).
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.threat_label

outputs.description: Threat class of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.property Property of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.threat_class

outputs.description: Profile of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.detected Date
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.profile

outputs.description: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.received Date Reception timestamp.
outputs.name: Detection timestamp.

outputs.description: Date Expiration timestamp. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.up
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.expiration

outputs.description: Status of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.dga Domain generation algorithm.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Batch ID of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.threat_score Threat score of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.batch_id

outputs.description: Threat score rating of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.threat_score_vector Threat score vector of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.threat_score_rating

outputs.description: Confidence score of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.confidence_score_rating Confidence score rating of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.confidence_score

outputs.description: Confidence score vector of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.notes Notes for the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.confidence_score_vector

outputs.description: Comments for the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.cyberint_guid GUID of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.comments

outputs.description: Protocol of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.references References of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.protocol

outputs.description: Original profile of the indicator. Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.attack_chain Attack chain of the indicator.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.original_profile

outputs.description: SHA256 of the sample.
outputs.name: Infoblox.FeedIndicator.extended.sample_sha256
